---
name: Data Report / Update
about: Report an issue with existing data, suggest correction, or provide verification for a data refresh.
title: "[DATA] "
labels: data, verification
assignees: ''
---

**Related to PR 7 GitHub issue template for data reports (sustainment).**

## Location / Feature
- Name / ID (from manifest or map):
- Coordinates (lat, lon):
- Current value in Fishmap:

## Reported Issue or Suggested Change
(Describe inaccuracy, outdated info, missing citation, classification error, etc. Include photos or screenshots if possible.)

## Source / Verification Evidence
- Portal / URL used for verification:
- Date checked:
- Excerpt or attachment description:
- On-site notes (if applicable):

## Proposed Action
- [ ] Update citation / last_verified
- [ ] Change access_type or quality
- [ ] Mark needs_review
- [ ] Other: 

**Note**: All data changes must go through the ETL pipeline + manifest (see docs/ETL-RUNBOOK.md and CONTRIBUTING.md). Do not submit hand-edited GeoJSON.

Thank you for helping keep the data authoritative.
